name: @radzor/realtime-chat
description: Real-time chat messaging via WebSocket. Supports rooms, typing indicators, message history, and user presence. Works in both browser and Node.js environments.

inputs.name: roomId
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the chat room to join.

inputs.name: userId
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the current user.

inputs.name: maxMessages
inputs.description: Maximum number of messages to keep in local buffer.

inputs.name: serverUrl
inputs.description: WebSocket server URL to connect to.

inputs.name: authToken
inputs.description: Authentication token for authorized connections (e.g. from @radzor/auth-oauth session.accessToken).

events.name: onMessage
events.description: Fired when a new message is received in the room.

events.name: onUserJoin
events.description: Fired when a user joins the room.

events.name: onUserLeave
events.description: Fired when a user leaves the room.

events.name: onTyping
events.description: Fired when a user starts or stops typing.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on connection or messaging errors.

actions.name: sendMessage
actions.description: Send a text message to the current room.

actions.name: joinRoom
actions.description: Join a chat room and start receiving messages.

actions.name: leaveRoom
actions.description: Leave the current room and disconnect.

actions.name: getHistory

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of past messages to retrieve.

actions.description: Retrieve message history for the current room.

actions.name: setTyping

params.name: isTyping
params.description: Whether the user is currently typing.

actions.description: Broadcast typing indicator to other users in the room.

llm.constraints: Requires a WebSocket server. For production, use wss:// (TLS). The server component handles room state and message broadcasting.
